title: cedrus deodara f. aurea
intro: Cedrus deodara f. aurea, also known as the Golden Deodar, is a variant of the Deodar cedar tree, characterized by its golden-hued foliage and slender, conical shape. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cedrus deodara f. aurea are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are believed to promote relaxation, alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds, and promote overall well-being.
